CREATE TABLE geometry_tests (id INT, geom GEOMETRYCOLLECTION);
SELECT ST_GEOMETRYN(geom, 1) FROM geometry_tests WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE additional_geometries (id INT, geom GEOMETRY);
SELECT ST_GEOMETRYN(geom, 2) FROM additional_geometries WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ST_GEOMETRYN((SELECT geom FROM geometry_tests WHERE id = 1), 2);
SELECT ST_GEOMETRYN(ST_GEOMETRYN(geom, 1), 1) FROM geometry_tests WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ST_GEOMETRYN(geom, 3) FROM (SELECT geom FROM geometry_tests) AS subquery WHERE id = 1;
CREATE TABLE complex_geometries (id INT, geom GEOMETRYCOLLECTION);
INSERT INTO complex_geometries VALUES (1, ST_EWKT_READ('GEOMETRYCOLLECTION(POINT(5 5), POLYGON((5 5,6 6,5 7,5 5)))'));
SELECT ST_GEOMETRYN(geom, 1) FROM complex_geometries WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ST_GEOMETRYN(st_geometryn(geom, 1), 1) FROM geometry_tests WHERE id = 1;
